name: GDPR Lawful Bases for Processing
description: The six lawful bases under GDPR Article 6(1) with use cases and requirements

rows.Can Withdraw?: Yes — must be as easy as giving

rows.When to Use: Delivering a purchased service, account management
rows.Key Requirement: Processing must be necessary for the contract
Must be required by EU or member state law
Protecting life — use only when no other basis applies
Official authority or public interest task
rows.Can Withdraw?: No — but right to object applies

rows.When to Use: Fraud prevention, network security, direct marketing (B2B)
rows.Key Requirement: Must pass three-part test: purpose, necessity, balancing

source: GDPR Article 6(1), ICO guidance on lawful basis
